headline: Linde Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings and Conference Call Schedule
summary: WOKING, England, April 07, 2026--Linde (Nasdaq: LIN) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results by 06:00 EDT/midday CEST on Friday, May 1, 2026. The Company will host and webcast its conference call at 09:00 EDT/15:00 CEST, which will be available to the public and the media in listen-only mode.

headline: Assessing Linde (LIN) Valuation After New Garysburg Air Separation Unit Expansion Plan
summary: Linde (LIN) is expanding its US footprint with plans to build, own, and operate a new air separation unit in Garysburg, North Carolina. The facility will supply liquid oxygen, nitrogen, and argon to regional customers. See our latest analysis for Linde. Investors have seen Linde’s share price build momentum recently, with a 14.25% 90 day share price return and 16.40% year to date, while its 1 year total shareholder return stands at 18.87%. The Garysburg expansion adds another data point to...
